extensionDescription.message: Qalabka isbarbardhigga kala duwanaanta khadka tooska ah ee fudud ee qoraalka iyo koodka.
extensionDescription.description: Description shown in the Chrome Web Store

headerSubtitle.message: Is barbar dhig qoraalka, koodka, JSON, iyo in ka badan - offline

placeholderOriginal.message: Ku dheji qoraalka asalka ah ama koodka halkan...

placeholderModified.message: Halkan ku dheji qoraal ama kood la beddelay...

emptyStateTitle.message: Diyaar u ah in la is barbar dhigo

emptyStateBody.message: Ku dheji qoraalka labada qaybood oo guji Is barbar dhig - ama taabo Ctrl+Enter

identicalBody.message: Wax farqi ah lagama helin labada qalab.

errorLargeInput.message: Gelintu aad bay u weyn tahay. Kala duwanaanshuhu wuxuu qaadan karaa daqiiqad...

errorBothEmpty.message: Fadlan ku dheji nuxurka labada dhinac ka hor intaadan is barbar dhigin.

errorOneEmpty.message: Hal guddi ayaa madhan. Fadlan ku bixi nuxurka labada dhinac.

formatJSONError.message: JSON aan ansax ahayn hal ama labadaba.
